name: Royal Gorge Farmers Market

Products.value: Fresh produce, handmade goods, and unique crafts (local produce, baked goods, specialty foods, farm products)

Address.value: 816 Royal Gorge Blvd, Cañon City, CO 81212 (Gateway Depot and Plaza, corner of US Hwy 50 and Hwy 115)

notes: The on-file website URL was truncated/broken (ended in '/faceb'); repaired to the chamber's dedicated market page https://www.royalgorgechamberalliance.org/royal-gorge-farmers-market/, which is the market's official page (run by Royal Gorge Chamber Alliance Foundation in partnership with Fremont Economic Development Corporation). Kept the on-file Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/royalgorgefarmersmarket) as the dedicated market page rather than the general Chamber of Commerce Facebook/Instagram found via WebFetch, since it is more specific to the market itself; did not update Facebook/Instagram fields since the market-specific FB was already on file and no dedicated Instagram was found. SNAP/EBT acceptance, ADA accessibility, and certified organic status were not clearly stated on any official source and were omitted.
